title: Loafy
body:
# Loafy  
Changes all items into BREAD...  

### Warning  
Older versions of the mod changed functionality of the items and are NOT recommended for use on long-term worlds. If you choose to ignore this warning you are doing so at your own risk, additionally you should create backups of your world.  
**1.1.2 onwards is client-side only and won't effect your worlds.**

## Mod Requirements
- Fabric Loader for the corresponding version.  
    - b1.7.3: [Babric](https://babric.github.io/)
    - 1.3.x-1.12.x: [Legacy Fabric](https://legacyfabric.net/)  
    - 1.20.5+: [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/)/[Quilt](https://quiltmc.org/)  

## FAQ  
- **Can I use this in a modpack or video?**
    - Yes, you can use this mod in modpacks or videos. However, please note this mod changes ALL items into bread and thus may not be suitable for your modpack or video.  
    - 1.1.2 is visual only, all previous versions also attempt to replace functionality.  
- **Will this mod be ported to x.x.x?**  
    - I am unlikely to port to specific versions, but as this mod was made for fun, however you can still ask. Other developers are free to port this mod, as long as they adhere to the conditions of the LGPL-3.0-or-later license.  
- **I've got an idea for a werid mod!**
    - That's great! I highly suggest trying to make your own mods, the chaos you can cause can be AWESOME. That being said, I'm always up for a challenge, so feel free to reach out with your wacky ideas and I *might* just attempt it!
- **Can I change what item everything looks like?**
    - Yes! You can adjust what item everything turns into in the config file.
      - Located in `%rundir%/config/loafy.properties`.

##  
Also check out the [Cursed Mods Collection](https://modrinth.com/collection/npoI3wH2).  
Also try [Bales](https://modrinth.com/mod/bales).  

## Credits  
- [DarkSunShyne](https://darksunshyne.carrd.co/) created the icon artwork for this mod.  


Thanks [Knarfy](https://www.youtube.com/@Knarfy) for showing the mod in your [I Broke Minecraft Without Crashing](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xaep8nyhONM) video!  
_To anyone that does attempt to speedrun this, feel free to share your footage! I'd love to check it out!_
[Loafy Speedruns Playlist](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLKuG5t_RCCbZJDxG7s5v4a1i3uUf5ImoH)
